subagent_notes: Chunk covers two distinct Bugsy attempt phases: (1) 'Playing as Brock' attempt (segs 147–168), which ends in loss to Scyther; (2) 'Smart Brock' phase (segs 169–198), testing tackle-only vs. defense-curl strategies. Despite the reset-heavy content, the commentary is mostly continuous strategic narration with minimal false starts — Teo is describing events as they unfold rather than re-recording over resets. The only clear false start is the 'we we' stutter in seg 186. The poison-repetition sequence (segs 191–197) runs 3 poison events in ~20s; seg 194 ('This time, no poison') is the one dispensable runt. Seg 193 ('We get poisoned again', 1.50s) is retained — it's on the keep-borderline and provides a structural beat between the full-heal explanation and the final poisoning. Atomic-numbered reference 'Smart Brock attempt number one' (seg 171) is intact and untouched.
